title: SR Manager - Slavonska Ravnica

fields.value:
1. Skini ZIP
2. Raspakiraj cijeli folder
3. Pokreni Pokreni SR Manager.bat
fields.name: Koraci

fields.value:
- Vise FS25 servera + ping i live status
- Licenca / HWID / probna 3 dana (bot API)
- SHA-256 mod manifest i sync (server-authoritative)
- GitHub auto-update u ispravan install folder (ZIP)
- Admin mod, bot config sync, session heartbeat
- UI 2.3: farmbuddy-style dark + gold, SrCard grid, platform kartice
- Tamni scrollbar, psenica/traktor siluete, DarkCheckBox
- Multiplayer folderi (favoriti, brzi odabir pri joinu)
- Mod favoriti + SHOW filter; save wizard 7 koraka (HR)
- Postavke: Steam/Xbox/Giants, intro skip, fullscreen F11
- Fix-Desktop-Shortcut.bat u ZIP paketu
fields.name: SR Manager (vs generic hub)

description:
Skini **SR_Manager.zip**, raspakiraj i pokreni **Pokreni SR Manager.bat** (ili SR Manager.vbs).

**NE** pokreci SRManager.exe - to je stari installer.

Problem? **TEST-POKRENI.bat**
